description.value: Aura moderate abjuration; CL 8th; Slot none; Price 64,305 gp; Weight 5 lbs. DESCRIPTION This ebon rod is so dark it seems to absorb the light around it. The rod functions as a +2 light mace, and allows its wielder to see in darkness as if she had the see in darkness ability. Three times per day, the wielder can use it to create a deeper darkness effect ( caster level 8th). To use this ability, the rod’s wielder must touch the target object, which is a standard action that provokes attacks of opportunity. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Rod, deeper darkness, true seeing; Cost 32,305 gp
